name: etl_type
description: Type of ETL process (catalog, transaction, inventory, labor, purchase_order)

name: status
description: Status of the ETL run (success, error, partial_success)

name: duration_seconds
description: Duration of the ETL run in seconds

name: run_timestamp
description: Timestamp when the ETL run started

name: error_message
description: Error message if the ETL run failed

name: environment
description: Environment where the ETL run was executed

name: metadata
description: Additional metadata about the ETL run
